Issues: The character design is heavily influenced by classic superhero tropes (costume, flying action). While the specific execution appears unique, the concept carries an elevated risk of being perceived as derivative of major comic book characters. Ensure all text or accompanying branding is original.

The piece is highly focused on a single, dramatic scene, which may limit its ability to be used for diverse merchandise (e.g., small sticker designs, minimalist apparel prints). It works best as a full-panel graphic.
